blocks.heading: Nein
blocks.text: Used only as a direct response to a question. It is a standalone word meaning 'No'.

examples.exp1: Question: Bist du Student? → Answer: Nein, ich bin Entwickler.

blocks.heading: Nicht
blocks.text: Use this to negate a verb or an adjective (to say you are 'not' doing something).

examples.exp1: Ich wohne nicht in Berlin. (I do not live in Berlin.)

examples.exp2: Das Taxi ist nicht hier. (The taxi is not here.)

blocks.heading: Kein
blocks.text: The 'Negative Article'. Use it to negate nouns that usually have 'ein' or 'eine'.

examples.exp1: Ich spreche keine Sprache. (I speak no language.)

examples.exp2: Ich habe kein Geld. (I have no money.)

rows.c1: I do not live in Berlin.
